Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Forger]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 1''' — A Forger is a soul type characterized by the hammer symbol and uses techniques to create weapons and wealth for the clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon asks Yerin if she is a Forger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Starting as a Forger means one will have to work extra hard as an Enforcer.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — The symbol of a Forger is a hammer.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — Forgers can make solid illusions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — Forger is a type of technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Pure madra is not an effective weapon even for a Forger.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — A Forger was raising her own defense.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Forger is part of the combatants.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — A man in gold armor uses the Forger technique.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
